title: Anjali Prajith

meta_lines: During my pregnancy journey, there were many moments when I felt afraid and unsure. But your guidance gave me strength, and your reassuring words filled me with courage. On the day of my delivery, your presence brought me peace I cannot put into words. Thank you, Doctor, for making this journey a beautiful one despite all its challenges. I will always remain grateful to you. May God bless you abundantly.
With love and gratitude, Anjali Prajith - Samanyu Rudra's Mother

title: Devi
paragraphs: My son TANMAY DOB 07-02-2024 My delivery date was on March 11, but on February 7 early morning about 3 AM I have a abdominal pain and bleeding was happened. At that time I was at Chalakudy, when I saw the bleeding and informed my husband and mother In law and we went to Metro hospital. That day I gave birth to my child evening at 3.47 PM.My child was LBW about 1.916 kg. I was so sad at that time and worried about his health. But such a caring doctors and nurses who provided emotional support during a challenging time and I got my son back with healthy state. He become 3kg on his 37th day, on these days I can't sleep because of his condition. Each and every time when I go to NICU the nurses give support and confidence to me. Thanks to the entire team for stand with me 🙏🏻

title: Monisha santhosh
paragraphs: Aarav.. 22-12-2015 Aarush... 08-02-2024 My journey started with you mam from 2014 and ended
meta_lines: in 2024..im thankful to god for giving me such a wonderful, energetic, cool doctor for my pregnancy time.. I liked the way mam handles any situation very cool and calm way and Not giving tension to us.. My second delivery was a exceptional one I hope mam remember me, on 8th of February early morning you have came to take delivery of someone, unexpectedly that time i was suffering from labour pain, nurses thought pain just started so more time needed.. But you checked and came to know that baby started to come, i was not in labour suit or that bed, just lying ordenery bed , i still remember the words, mam told no problm we can take the delivery here itself without giving any tension to me... Thanku so much mam once again and also very sad that you are not there to treat us Best wishes for the future plans

title: Dr. Navina
paragraphs: My pregnancy journey along with Jyothi Mam,started when i stuck with the news that I have one APLA antibody positive and was suggested daily heparin injection for the rest of my pregnancy by other doctors. I had already suffered a pregnancy loss one year back..But mam simply made my pregnancy journey easier and stress free with only necessary medicines and minimal investigations..I understand how genuine you have been and how you stood with my family throughout my pregnancy..We thank God for you and will remember you in our prayers. Navina and Kiran

title: SRUTHY
paragraphs: Year of Delivery: 2022
meta_lines: My pregnancy has been an incredibly informative and transformative journey. Each phase brought new experiences and learnings that prepared me both mentally and physically for motherhood. From my 7th month, I began consulting Dr. Jyothy Mary – and that truly became a turning point. Her guidance, especially recommending prenatal yoga and breathing exercises, played a key role in helping me have a smooth, normal delivery of my baby boy. As a first-time mom, I navigated this journey with the help of accurate information, consistent activities, a nourishing meal plan, and gentle postnatal exercises that supported my healing. I’m deeply thankful for the care and knowledge I received – it made all the difference.

title: Arunima
paragraphs: I'm Arunima,I was too late to see those msgs send on group.My pregnancy was one of the great memorable journey because of your treatments and especially your online classes. I've always attended those classes lately or may be next day, but I've sincerely attended almost all classes. I've used to play those classes on speaker when I'm pregnant and used to do my household chores. Sometimes I may be tired and get some wonderful naps during those classes 🫢. But I sincerely played those classes repeatedly until I catch them. After my delivery when my baby just less than 20 days old I've used to play one of the new classes infront of her, she's just curious and smiled (It was her very first smile). It was one of the best memory. I'm always a sensitive person and get tensed easily over small issues. That makes my baby come out 1 week early.But you are such a cool person makes me tension free. I don't know how do I find a better Doctor than this.Thankful for all those wonderful memories. All wishes for new clinic and services.

title: Sreelakshmi
paragraphs: Baby name - Pallavi vivek Date of birth -12/05/2025 On 12th May 2025, my daughter was born through normal delivery. The guidance and advice to follow a healthy routine and continuous sessions how to be calm in the delivery room, how to tackle the delivery pain using breathing exercises made my pregnancy journey easier. And I can proudly say to everyone that I didn't cry throughout my 9hour labour. My husband has witnessed the whole delivery and he said When she was born how easily you removed the chord from her neck and held a calm face because she wasn't crying and handed over her to the pediatrician, that showed us your professional experience and because of you we were also calm. We just trusted you and we got our precious little one safely. A big salute to you doctor and congratulations for your next milestone.

title: Sreelakshmi Vivek
paragraphs: Baby name - Pallavi vivek Date of birth -12/05/2025 On 12th May 2025, my daughter was born through normal delivery. The guidance and advice to follow a healthy routine and continuous sessions how to be calm in the delivery room, how to tackle the delivery pain using breathing exercises made my pregnancy journey easier. And I can proudly say to everyone that I didn't cry throughout my 9hour labour. My husband has witnessed the whole delivery and he said When she was born how easily you removed the chord from her neck and held a calm face because she wasn't crying and handed over her to the pediatrician, that showed us your professional experience and because of you we were also calm. We just trusted you and we got our precious little one safely. A big salute to you doctor and congratulations for your next milestone.

title: Vishnupriya
paragraphs: Hi Doctor, you are an amazing human being! Its clearly visible by the way you talk and the ideas and ideologies you carry. Your YouTube live has greatly helped me in taking care of my health even now. It was very informative. I read your book as well. Thankyou for all the things you do for others. Wish there were more people like you. All the best for your new venture. I am sure you will succeed in this new portfolio as well because of your passion for the profession. Once again thankyou so much for making my pregnancy journey smooth and a pleasant memory.
Daughter Nakshatra 12.4.2023

title: Nikha Dharman
paragraphs: Ved Ayanikkal,[02-08-21]

title: Nadiya Najeeb
paragraphs: Son : Iziyan Zaim Year of delivery : 2022
meta_lines: I Nadiya Najeeb, was blessed with a baby boy on 7th June 2022. Pregnancy during the corona period wasn’t easy, but Ma’am, your sweet smile always healed our worries and gave us strength. With your support, I had a smooth and memorable experience, and today I enjoy a happy motherhood with my little one. Thank you, Ma’am, for making this journey so comforting.

title: Feba Benny
paragraphs: Aiden Geo Akhil 01-06-2022

title: Sajana shakkeer
paragraphs: Year of delivery 2021 September 14 Childs name: Ayzal Ayrin This was my second delivery, and I felt so much more at mental ease with the doctor’s guidance. It wasn’t just about monthly visits — we also had interactive sessions that made me feel supported throughout. The doctor truly helped me a lot during my pregnancy journey. I’m so grateful for the guidance and care. Thank you!

title: Thafseena.
paragraphs: Hi Jyothi Mam🥰 Iam Thafseena. Mother of Fathima Ayra. Aug 21 2023. Now 2 years old for my Baby.. Doctork ormma undonn ariyillaa.. Kore adhikam complications aayt aan dlvry aayath.. Premature baby aayrnnu. Brth weight 1.800 aayrnnu. Last semseteril sugar koodi. Bt baby weight koodunilla... Kore complications prnjrnnu after delivery mathram ntha problem enn parayan patukayulluu ennan dctrs parannjirunnath... Babyk valarcha varunilla. Athpole aal oke aan.. Bt dlvry kzhjal aan ntha problem enn aryllu. angne oke orupad problems paranjirunnu.. Thank god... After dlvry problems onnum indayilla.. Babyk ipo 2 age aay..aaal active aan.. Naughty aaan🤭 Doctor Nalla suport aayrnnu and nurses also..kare centeril aayrnnu scaning.. Prasanth dctr aayrnnu kandirnnath.. Jyothi mam nalla suport aayrnnj. Dlvry timil aayalum. Tension aakeela.. 🥺orupad veshamichu bt dctr njnghale cool aakiyrnnuu. Thnkss dctrr.. 🥰always u r a good nd supoorting doctor.🥰

title: Reji
paragraphs: Nika Pallavi 24/09/2024 I am grateful to b the part of u mam in my pregnancy journey.. it was a peaceful n happy months with ur guidance.. i am always remember ur happy face n smile in my anxious time which melts our heart ❤️ thank you so much mam.. and also wish to continue ur journey

title: Swathykrishna
subtitle: Vaikhari K Viswam DOB - 01.08.2025
paragraphs: Sincere thanks for your guidance and care throughout my pregnancy which helped me to overcome my tension. Truly grateful.
